document.name: 92NY Camp Yomi (2026)
document.shortDescription: Classic 92NY day camp at Rockland County grounds with bus service from NYC: two swims daily, sports, arts, adventure, and a Lexington Ave camp office for Manhattan families.
document.longDescription:
92NY (formerly 92nd Street Y) has run summer camps for more than 60 years. Its official camps about page describes a 50-acre Rockland County campground about 20 minutes outside New York City with swim, sports, creative arts, adventure courses, and air-conditioned coach buses with onboard bathrooms. Camp Yomi is the traditional day-camp track linked from the official Yomi page and summarized on ACA’s Find-a-Camp listing as serving children entering kindergarten through fourth grade at the Rockland campground with transportation from Manhattan.

The same about page highlights two swims per day (instructional and free swim), sports including gymnastics and baseball, ceramics and jewelry-making, low staff-to-camper ratios, and values-based programming. Winter camp registration contact on that page: 1395 Lexington Avenue, New York, NY 10128; 212.415.5573; email link provided on 92ny.org.

Rockland camp address listed on the official page: Orangeburg, NY 10962. Families should use 92NY’s bus map and Dates & Rates (tuition) pages on 92ny.org for current 2026 sessions, pickup locations, and pricing.

Sources: https://www.92ny.org/children-family/camps/about https://www.92ny.org/children-family/camps/yomi https://find.acacamps.org/program_profile.php?program_id=2014
document.announcementDescription: Official camp pages describe coach-bus pickups in Manhattan for the Rockland campground—see 92NY’s bus map and registration portal for 2026 details.
